title: Spotlight on FHA: Unlocking Opportunities for Brokers
subtitle: Explore the potential of FHA loans to expand your client base and close more deals, especially for credit-challenged borrowers.
keyTakeaways: Identify and assist credit-challenged borrowers with FHA loans.
Utilize FHA Streamline Refinance for existing clients.
Use FHA as a backup for conventional loan denials.
Efficiently price and submit FHA loans via PRO Portal.
Keep updated on FHA guidelines to better serve clients.

sections.heading: Identify Credit-Challenged Borrowers
sections.body: FHA loans are tailored for clients with lower credit scores. Focus on borrowers turned down by conventional lenders due to credit issues or high DTI ratios.
bullets: Review potential FHA candidates' credit profiles.
Connect with underserved markets and first-time buyer groups.

sections.heading: Streamline Refinances
sections.body: Assist existing FHA clients in reducing their rates and payments with minimal documentation through FHA Streamline Refinance, enhancing client satisfaction.
bullets: Ensure all client documentation is complete before submission.
Regularly update your knowledge of FHA Streamline Refinance requirements.

sections.heading: Rescue from Conventional Denials
sections.body: When a conventional loan falls through, consider FHA as an alternative. Assess eligibility based on DTI, credit score, or employment history to salvage potential deals.
bullets: Use PRO Portal for accurate pricing and efficient loan submission.

metaDescription: Leverage FHA loans to boost your business. Identify credit-challenged borrowers, streamline refinances, and rescue conventional denials.
